ogTitle: Burwood Heights vs Busbys Flat: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Burwood Heights and Busbys Flat.
heading: Burwood Heights vs Busbys Flat — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Burwood Heights, New South Wales and Busbys Flat, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Burwood Heights has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Busbys Flat (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Burwood Heights or Busbys Flat safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Burwood Heights has a flood risk score of 37/100, while Busbys Flat scores 28/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Burwood Heights scores 22/100 for bushfire risk. Busbys Flat scores 61/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Burwood Heights or Busbys Flat?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Burwood Heights has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.15% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
